conflicts.description: The prior continuity sheet placed Nate's return to Kassos and discovery of the Eastbridge file in mid-July 2005, but the manuscript shows Chapter 3 on July 13, 2005 and Chapter 4 says he misses the rest of that week plus the following week before returning on a Monday.
conflicts.resolution_note: Updated the sheet to the manuscript timeline because the dated July 13 scene and the stated two-week absence make a mid-July return impossible. The exact July 25 date is an inference from those lines.
